Localization.Description: A security-critical virtual machine is cloned

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to clone security-critical virtual machine "{object.name}" found during a scan
The user {subject.account.name} cloned security-critical virtual machine "{object.name}" added manually
The user {subject.account.name} cloned security-critical virtual machine "{object.name}" found during a scan
The user {subject.account.name} is cloning security-critical virtual machine "{object.name}" found during a scan
The user {subject.account.name} failed to clone security-critical virtual machine "{object.name}" added manually
The user {subject.account.name} is cloning security-critical virtual machine "{object.name}" added manually
